test_cases.name: 云存档读取（空存档）
test_cases.note: Player has existing save data from prior test runs; GET /v1/save/:playerId returned 200 OK. Route is /v1/save/:playerId not /v1/save.

test_cases.name: IAP 沙盒购买流程
test_cases.note: sku_id glowstone_50 is not in SKU catalog (valid SKUs: first_pack, small_pack, medium_pack, large_pack, mega_pack, monthly_card, starter_pack). Used small_pack (60 glowstone, $0.99). Apple receipt verification bypassed in NODE_ENV=development.

iap_smoke.note: NODE_ENV=development bypasses Apple receipt call; sandbox receipt accepted; glowstone_granted=60 via small_pack SKU

notes.save_route_correction: Actual route is GET/PUT /v1/save/:playerId, not /v1/save. Task spec used /v1/save which returns 404; corrected to parameterized form using player_id from TC-S02 JWT payload.
notes.sku_id_correction: glowstone_50 is not a valid SKU. Valid SKUs from SKU_CONFIG: first_pack, small_pack, medium_pack, large_pack, mega_pack, monthly_card, starter_pack.
notes.environment: PostgreSQL running locally on port 5432; all DB operations succeeded. Prisma client pre-generated.
